title: 22 Pcs 18th Birthday Decorations, Black Gold 18th Birthday Banners 12 Inches Balloons for Women and Men Party Decorations
features: Package Included: Reusable birthday decoration set includes 2 pcs happy birthday banners for 18 years old, 1 pc triangle flags with 12 pcs different patterns, 10 pcs latex balloons(5 pc black, 5 pcs golden), 300+ pcs Birthday Confetti.
Material: 18th birthday banners are made of paper, sturdy, and durable. Birthday balloons are made of synthetic latex.

Easy to Use: Each card has two holes at the top, you can use a ribbon to string the 18th birthday banners and triangle flag. Use a towel or blanket to wipe the confetti balloon, and shake it slowly, these colorful pieces stick on the sides of the balloon.

Unforgettable Memory: 18th birthday decorations are mainly black gold. Unique shapes birthday banners and balloon suits make your party more active, creating an unforgettable 18th birthday memory for you, your family, and your friends.

Wide Use: 18th party decorations are suitable for birthday/wedding party decoration and anniversary celebration decor. You can hang them on the wall, door, window, indoors or outdoors, adding a more joyful atmosphere.
